title: Vegan Miso Soup with Toast
description: A simple and comforting soup made with a miso paste made from koji, served with crispy toast.
instructions: In a pan, heat 2 tbsp of shoyu over low heat.
Add 100g of koji and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add 200g of egyptian mushy peas and cook for a further 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Season with additional shoyu to taste.
Serve hot with crispy toast on the side.
